positive: Minimalist abstract geometric pattern featuring interlocking celestial shapes, inspired by cosmic nebula and art deco symmetry. The central motif is a stylized crescent moon nestled within interconnected golden orbits and deep indigo starbursts. Use high contrast contrast between matte indigo fields and metallic gold accents. The composition must be highly repeatable and tileable, creating a striking, elegant, and modern aesthetic. Flat vector style with subtle gradient shading for depth. Suitable for allover apparel print, featuring clean silhouettes and radiating energy. Cinematic studio lighting, crisp focus, ultra-detailed, clean lines, poster art.
negative: blurry, messy, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, photo-realistic, grunge, messy lines, bokeh, gradients (unless specified), low contrast
